race_name: Bob Cook Memorial Mt. Evans Hill Climb (Blue Sky Hill Climb)
query: Bob Cook Memorial Mt. Evans Hill Climb gran fondo cycling Idaho Springs

videos.title: Mt  Evans Descent
videos.description: A few Alabamians enjoying the reward that comes after the Bob Cook Memorial Mt. Evans Hill Climb, July 21, 2018.  Speed data is *calculated* 2D speed, due to some Garmin synchronization errors. Reliving the ride? Watch this from your rollers and pedal to your heart's content! #churchofpain #threesaparty

videos.title: Mt. Evans Co. Climb 2018
videos.description: Cycling up Mt. Evans from Idaho Springs Co.

videos.title: 2019 Mt Evans Hill Climb Race - Gran Fondo
videos.description:
My first Evans hill climb race so entered in Gran Fondo 40-49mens.
Official results I finished 17th out of 44 with a time of 3hr:25min

videos.title: Susie Jones | Cycling Highlight | Mt Evans Hill Climb | Road Race
videos.description: Mt Evans Hill Climb starts in Idaho Springs, Colorado and finishes at the summit of the Mt Evans road (14,130 ft).  Mt Evans is a Colorado 14er.
